hypothesis: On the XDIP dataset, an E(3)-equivariant graph neural network that encodes all atoms within 5 Å of the Fe center (including second-sphere residues and hydrogen-bond interactions) will reduce Fe K-edge EXAFS prediction MAE to ≤0.081—at least a 20% improvement over the reported first-sphere-only GIN baseline (0.101 ± 0.004).
